mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{username} ORDER BY order_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, order_date, ship_addr1, ship_addr2, ship_city, ship_state, ship_zip, ship_country, bill_addr1, bill_addr2, bill_city, bill_state, bill_zip, bill_country, courier, total_price, bill_to_firstname, bill_to_lastname, ship_to_firstname, ship_to_lastname, credit_card, expiry_date, card_type, locale, ship_address_id, bill_address_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{orderDate}, #{shipAddress1}, #{shipAddress2}, #{shipCity}, #{shipState}, #{shipZip}, #{shipCountry}, #{billAddress1}, #{billAddress2}, #{billCity}, #{billState}, #{billZip}, #{billCountry}, #{courier}, #{totalPrice}, #{billToFirstName}, #{billToLastName}, #{shipToFirstName}, #{shipToLastName}, #{creditCard}, #{expiryDate}, #{cardType}, #{locale}, #{shipAddressId}, #{billAddressId})
INSERT INTO orderstatus (order_id, linenum, timestamp, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, 0, #{orderDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT l.*, i.listprice FROM lineitem l JOIN item i ON l.item_id = i.item_id WHERE l.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lineitem (order_id, lineitem_id, item_id, quantity, unitprice) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lineItemId}, #{itemId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT nextid FROM sequence WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE sequence SET nextid = #{nextId} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE inventory SET qty = qty - #{increment} WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT qty FROM inventory WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
